scripts.build:desktop: swift build --package-path desktop/convex/blog && swift build --package-path desktop/convex/chat && swift build --package-path desktop/convex/movie && swift build --package-path desktop/convex/org
scripts.build:mobile: swift build --package-path mobile/convex/blog && swift build --package-path mobile/convex/chat && swift build --package-path mobile/convex/movie && swift build --package-path mobile/convex/org
scripts.ci: bun tsc && lintmax check && bun build:ts
scripts.fix: lintmax fix && (O=$(turbo typecheck build --output-logs=errors-only 2>&1) || { echo "$O"; false; }) && bun format:swift && bun lint:swift
scripts.format:swift: (ls **/*.swift &>/dev/null && { O=$(swiftformat . 2>&1) || { echo "$O"; false; }; } || true) && (ls **/*.kt &>/dev/null && { ktlint --format '**/*.kt' > /dev/null 2>&1 || true; O=$(ktlint '**/*.kt' 2>&1) || { echo "$O"; false; }; } || true)
scripts.lint:swift: (ls **/*.swift &>/dev/null && { swiftlint lint --fix > /dev/null 2>&1 || true; O=$(swiftlint lint --strict 2>&1) || { echo "$O"; false; }; } || true) && (O=$(yamllint . 2>&1) || { echo "$O"; false; })
scripts.spacetime:generate: PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" spacetime generate --lang typescript --out-dir packages/spacetimedb/src/generated --module-path packages/be-spacetimedb
scripts.spacetime:health: curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/v1/ping && echo ' SpacetimeDB is healthy'
scripts.spacetime:reset: docker compose -f ohmystack.yml down spacetimedb -v && docker compose -f ohmystack.yml up spacetimedb -d
scripts.spacetime:up: docker compose -f ohmystack.yml up spacetimedb stdb-minio -d && PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" spacetime server add local --url http://localhost:3000 --no-fingerprint --default 2>/dev/null; echo 'SpacetimeDB ready on http://localhost:3000'
